notices.device_registered: Device registered. API key saved in plugin settings.
notices.sync_disabled_revoked: Sync disabled: device API key is invalid/revoked. Re-register device in plugin settings.
notices.auth_token_missing: Auth token is required for automatic device registration.
notices.vault_name_required: Vault name is required before registering a device.
notices.passphrase_required: Passphrase is required before registering a device.
settings.enable_sync.name: Enable sync
settings.enable_sync.desc: Turn automatic sync on/off. Manual sync command still works.
settings.startup_mode.name: Startup sync mode
settings.startup_mode.desc: Off: no startup sync. Immediate: sync right after startup. Smooth: delayed warm-up sync.
settings.bootstrap_policy.name: Initial sync policy
settings.bootstrap_policy.desc: Used only for the first sync on this device when connecting to an existing vault.
settings.server_url.name: Server URL
settings.server_url.desc: Base URL of the Sync API
settings.server_status.name: Server status
settings.server_status.title: Connection status
settings.auth_token.name: Auth token
settings.auth_token.desc: Shared secret required by server to register new devices.
settings.passphrase.name: Passphrase
settings.vault_current.name: Current vault
settings.vault_picker.configure_first: Enter server URL and auth token to manage vaults.
settings.vault_picker.empty: No vaults found. Create a new one below.
settings.vault_picker.delete_confirm: Delete vault "{{name}}" and all its data? This cannot be undone.
settings.register_device.name: Register device
settings.register_device.desc: Requests API key/device ID from server and saves them.
settings.register_device.revoked_desc: Device key is revoked. Click Register to re-register this device.
settings.interval_sec.name: Interval (sec)
settings.enable_websocket.name: Real-time sync (WebSocket)
settings.enable_websocket.desc: Receive instant notifications when other devices push changes. Falls back to polling if unavailable.
settings.pull_batch.name: Pull batch size
settings.blob_batch.name: Blob batch size
settings.blob_batch.desc: Number of blob hashes in one batched download request.
settings.concurrent_uploads.name: Max concurrent uploads
settings.retry_window.name: Retry base/max (ms)
settings.retry_window.desc: Exponential backoff window for transient network errors.
settings.debug_perf.name: Debug perf logs
settings.debug_perf.desc: Emit detailed sync stage timing logs to developer console.
vault_modal.desc_create: Choose a passphrase for client-side encryption. All devices joining this vault will need the same passphrase.
vault_modal.desc_join: Enter the passphrase that was set when this vault was created.
vault_modal.desc_delete: Enter the vault passphrase to confirm deletion. This action cannot be undone.
settings.conflicts.name: Conflict files
settings.conflicts.desc: Found {{count}} conflict files in the vault.
